falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes below the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms continued bearish momentum, invalidating the bottom pattern expectation

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume declines below the 30-day average by 40% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates lack of market participation, contradicting the blowoff score's implied urgency

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 makes a new 52-week low while the VIX remains below 20
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Suggests capitulation without volatility, directly opposing the bottom pattern's typical conditions

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
